2605.13481.title: PersonalAI 2.0: Enhancing knowledge graph traversal/retrieval with planning mechanism for Personalized LLM Agents
2605.13481.paper_summary: We introduce PersonalAI 2.0 (PAI-2), a novel framework, designed to enhance large language model (LLM) based systems through integration of external knowledge graphs (KG). The proposed approach addresses key limitations of existing Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) methods by incorporating a dynamic, multistage query processing pipeline. The central point of PAI-2 design is its ability to perform adaptive, iterative information search, guided by extracted entities, matched graph vertices and generated clue-queries. Conducted evaluation over six benchmarks (Natural Questions, TriviaQA, HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, MuSiQue and DiaASQ) demonstrates improvement in factual correctness of generating answers compared to analogues methods (LightRAG, RAPTOR, and HippoRAG 2). PAI-2 achieves 4% average gain by LLM-as-a-Judge across four benchmarks, reflecting its effectiveness in reducing hallucination rates and increasing precision. We show that use of graph traversal algorithms (e.g. BeamSearch, WaterCircles) gain superior results compared to standard flatten retriever on average 6%, while enabled search plan enhancement mechanism gain 18% boost compared to disabled one by LLM-as-a-Judge across six datasets. In addition, ablation study reveals that PAI-2 achieves the SOTA result on MINE-1 benchmark, achieving 89% information-retention score, using LLMs from 7-14B tiers. Collectively, these findings underscore the potential of PAI-2 to serve as a foundational model for next-generation personalized AI applications, requiring scalable, context-aware knowledge representation and reasoning capabilities.
2605.13481.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 PersonalAI 2.0 (PAI-2)，這是一個新穎的框架，旨在通過整合外部知識圖譜 (KG) 來增強基於大型語言模型 (LLM) 的系統。<lb/>所提出的方法通過納入動態的多階段查詢處理管道，解決了現有圖檢索增強生成 (GraphRAG) 方法的主要限制。<lb/>PAI-2 設計的核心在於其能夠執行自適應的、迭代的信息搜索，這一過程由提取的實體、匹配的圖頂點和生成的提示查詢所引導。<lb/>在六個基準測試（Natural Questions、TriviaQA、HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA、MuSiQue 和 DiaASQ）上進行的評估顯示，與類似方法（LightRAG、RAPTOR 和 HippoRAG 2）相比，生成答案的事實正確性有所改善。<lb/>PAI-2 在四個基準測試中通過 LLM-as-a-Judge 實現了 4% 的平均增益，反映出其在降低幻覺率和提高精確度方面的有效性。<lb/>我們展示了使用圖遍歷算法（例如 BeamSearch、WaterCircles）相比於標準展平檢索器平均獲得了 6% 的優越結果，而啟用的搜索計劃增強機制相比於禁用的則在 LLM-as-a-Judge 的評估中獲得了 18% 的提升，這是在六個數據集上進行的。<lb/>此外，消融研究顯示 PAI-2 在 MINE-1 基準上達到了 SOTA 結果，實現了 89% 的信息保留分數，使用的 LLM 來自 7-14B 級別。<lb/>總體而言，這些發現強調了 PAI-2 作為下一代個性化 AI 應用的基礎模型的潛力，這些應用需要可擴展的、上下文感知的知識表示和推理能力。
2605.13481.author: Mikhail Menschikov et.al.
2605.13481.authors: Mikhail Menschikov, Matvey Iskornev, Alexander Kharitonov, Alina Bogdanova, Mikhail Belkin, Ekaterina Lisitsyna, Artyom Sosedka, Victoria Dochkina, Ruslan Kostoev, Ilia Perepechkin, Evgeny Burnaev
